Level2.description: Companies that are involved in banking services including both retail and corporate banking activities and all other services provided by banks. This will cover only Banks and will include those whose proper bifurcation is not given.
Companies that are involved in offering banking services to individuals. These services can include checking and saving accounts, personal loans, credit cards, mortgages or other financial products.
Companies that are involved in offering banking services to business clients. These services can include current account, corporate loans or any services provided to help businesses grow.

Companies that are involved in assisting advisory based financial transactions on behalf of individuals, corporates. It also assists companies involved in mergers and acquisitions (M&A) and provide ancillary services such as market making, trading of derivatives and equity securities.
Companies that are involved in providing any other insurance which can't be covered under remaining classification.
Companies that are involved in providing insurance that covers the medical expenses of the insured due to an illness in exchange of a premium amount.
Companies that are involved in providing insurance to cover losses/damages related to life or due to accidental damages to policyholder.

Companies that are involved in providing insurance to cover losses/damages related to life, health or due to accidental damages to policyholder. It covers all three types of insurance i.e., Life, health, and accident
Companies that are involved in providing insurance coverage for a wide range of risks excluding life insurance. It may include health, property, automobile, or any other non-life insurance.
Companies that are involved in providing commercial insurance and reinsurance for Crop protection, Marine, Property, or any other assets.
Companies that are involved in offering insurance cover for loss or damage to any vehicle like car, two-wheeler, or commercial vehicle, etc. It also includes reinsurance of automobile.

Companies that are involved in providing insurance brokerage services or underwrites third party insurance on behalf of insurance companies. This will also include banks that underwrites third party insurance on behalf of third-party insurance companies.
Companies that are involved in offering a wide range of products and services that helps businesses, individuals, organizations, etc. manage their money, investments, and financial assets.
Companies that are involved in providing capital/financial leasing to commercial and consumer borrowers outside the traditional banking system.
Companies that are involved in providing loans or leasing finance related to automobile.

Level2.Level2_Name: Trading/ Capital Markets and Brokerage Firm
Level2.description: Financial firm or commercial bank that invests for direct market gain. Proprietary trading may involve the trading of stocks, bonds, commodities, currencies, or other instruments. Companies that engage in the provision of providing trading platforms/services to private investors and traders. In addition, these companies also provide brokerage services. It includes Hedge Funds also.
Companies that are involved in Forex trading. i.e., trading of different currencies.
Companies that own, manage, and operates financial exchanges and providing marketplace where securities, commodities, derivatives, and other financial instruments can be traded.
Companies that are involved in providing financial, tax, accounting, and corporate data. Ex- Bloomberg, FactSet.
Companies that are involved in providing wealth and asset management services.

Level2.Level2_Name: Real Estate Asset Management and Investment
Level2.description: Companies that are involved in the business of real estate investment and portfolio management.

Companies that are involved in investing in non-public companies or assets through transactions possibly structured using common and preferred equity, convertible securities, subordinated debt and warrants or other derivatives. Companies that engage in leveraged buyouts, employ mezzanine financing or companies that manage these private equity funds are also considered under here. It also includes venture capital companies that provide financial, technical, and other support to small companies/startups.
Companies that are involved in the business of investing the pooled capital of investors in financial securities. These companies do not include private equity and venture capital companies.
Companies that are involved in providing indexing solutions namely index construction, maintenance, calculation, etc.

Companies that are involved in providing credit information, analysis, and scores. This classification seeks to cover companies that provide services related to credit risks and credit guarantee including guarantee services against sales credit, contractor credit, guarantee services by debtor's trust, guarantee services against advance payment credit, and guarantee services related to company acquisition and other types of financial guarantees. This also includes credit rating agencies.

Companies that are solely established to raise capital from investors for the purpose of acquiring one or more operating businesses. Companies with no commercial operations are known as SPAC or blank check companies.
Companies that are involved in providing facilities to financial institutions to recover their debt.

Companies that are involved in comprehensive management of the complete cash cycle including cash transportation services, management of ATMs, mainly for financial institutions, businesses, government agencies, central banks etc.
Companies that are involved in the trading of commodities.
Companies that are involved in providing Fintech services and cannot be covered under remaining themes.

Level2.Level2_Name: Digital Payment Infrastructure and Services Providers
Level2.description: Companies that are involved in providing digital mode of payments, such as mobile, online, and digital wallets. This also Includes prepaid cards, money transfer services, clearing houses and facilitates the point-of-sale infrastructure such as POS machines and payment gateways. Companies issuing Debit and credit cards will also be covered under this classification.
Companies that are involved in providing a form of financial technology that connects borrower and lender through online platforms or websites.
Companies that are involved in providing offline or online platforms for collecting funds from individual members to finance projects and businesses.

Companies that are involved in providing services related to cryptocurrencies, namely crypto mining, crypto trading, and crypto wallets. This also includes companies that utilize blockchain technology to provide financial services. Companies that are involved in the development of other alternative currencies are also eligible for inclusion.
Companies that are involved in providing short term financing services which allow customers to make purchases and pay for them over time after an up-front payment.

Companies that are involved in providing technology-enabled investment solutions. These companies develop personal finance software, provide robo-advisor solutions that leverage automation/algorithms. This does not include traditional fund administrators that provide technology services.

REITs that are involved in owning, operating, managing, acquiring, and developing retail properties or office buildings. These properties include regional shopping malls, outlet centres, shopping centres, strip malls, power centres, and freestanding retail properties. Office REITs lease the offices to companies that need space to accommodate their employees.
REITs that are involved in owning and managing storage facilities and collecting rent from customers. Self-storage REITs rent space to both individuals and businesses.
REITS that are involved in owning and managing the telecommunication towers, fibre cables, wireless infrastructure and collecting rent from tenants.
REITs that are involved in owning, acquiring, and managing hotels, motels, luxury resorts, and business-class hotels, and leasing out space to guests.

Level2.Level2_Name: Green Real Estate Investment Trusts (Green REITs)
Level2.description: REITs that are involved in owning, operating, managing of green buildings. These buildings are designed and constructed to be environmentally responsible, sustainable, and resource-efficient throughout their life cycle.

REITs that are involved in owning, managing various forms of residences, and rent out space to tenants. This includes REITs that specialize in apartment buildings, student housing, manufactured homes, and single-family homes.

REITs that are involved in owning, operating, managing, acquiring, and developing healthcare related properties. These facilities include senior living communities, hospitals, medical office and outpatient facilities, life science innovation and research properties, and skilled nursing facilities.

REITs that are involved in owning and managing facilities that customers use to safely store data. Data centre REITs offer a range of products and services to help in keeping servers and data safe, including providing uninterruptable power supplies, air-cooled chillers, and physical security.

REITs that are involved in investing in residential or commercial mortgage-backed securities or loans. These companies primarily invest in mortgages or mortgage-backed securities rather than physical properties.
REITs that are involved in investing in any industrial or Warehouse properties.

REITS that are involved in the acquisition, development, ownership, management, and leasing of properties such as Gyms, Agriculture, Prison REITs etc. This will exclude industrial & warehouse, hotels, residential, data centre, mortgage, self-storage, cell tower, green, healthcare, and commercial REITs.

Companies that are involved in constructing, owning, operating, and managing any type of real estate buildings. These companies earn revenue by leasing and selling the properties to both individuals and businesses.
This includes companies, firms or agencies that act as a medium for buyers and sellers to get in touch with each other regarding the real estate properties.

This Theme Include companies which are involve in energy production and cannot be covered under remaining theme. It also companies which involved in production of energy from different source but revenue bifurcation is not given ex-wind, solar, Natural gas, etc.
This Theme includes Companies that are involved in production and generation of hydroelectricity by hydroelectric plants or water source
This Theme includes Companies that are involved in production and generation of wind energy through wind farms
This Theme includes Companies that are involved in production of heat energy from the earth including but not limited to geothermal power plant and geothermal heat pumps.
This theme includes Companies which are producing energy from burning wood or any other organic matter like by-product of crops
This theme includes Companies that involved in production of electricity by burning fuel like- Coal, LNG or any other substance

This Theme includes Companies that are involved in the production of clean fuels such as bio-diesel fuel, ethanol fuel, LNG, CNG and the like are considered under this sub-theme. Excluding Hydrogen Fuel Cell, Natural gas, etc.
This Theme includes Companies that are involved in production of electricity from nuclear fission, nuclear decay, and nuclear fusion reactions
This Theme includes Companies that are involved in production of electricity from Solar Energy

This Theme includes Companies that Involved in production of electricity from any renewable source such as wind, solar, geothermal or any other type of renewable source but revenue bifurcation is not given.

This includes all the companies which are in Upstream energy and cannot be covered under remaining themes. It also includes companies involved in different upstream operations, but revenue bifurcation is not given.
This Theme includes Companies that involved in the initial process of searching for and extracting oil and gas.
This theme includes companies involved in providing building facilities, installations, and equipment required by energy companies to run their operations
Companies engaged in providing services like drilling and formation evaluation, well construction, well servicing operations, including well strengthening and maintaining well fields.

Companies engaged in providing services to oil and gas exploration companies to analyse subsurface geological conditions to increase the potential of hydrocarbon bearing wells example logging services.  Includes Seismic Data Acquisition/Processing.
This Theme includes Companies involved in process of extracting coal from ground or from a mine

Companies involved in the process of extraction of radioactive nuclear ore from the ground. E.g. - uranium, etc. also include companies that are engaged in nuclear fuel, nuclear fuel components and services for the nuclear power industry.
A company or person that owns a royalty interest does not bear any operational costs needed to produce the resource, yet they still own a portion of the resource or revenue it produces
This Theme includes companies involved in midstream / downstream cannot be covered under remaining themes.

Level2.Level2_Name: Oil & Gas Storage and Pipeline Services
Level2.description: This theme includes Companies involved in operation of oil and gas pipeline through which providing transportation services to third party. It also includes companies provides transportation as well storage service, but revenue bifurcation is not given

Level2.Level2_Name: Oil & Gas Storage and Tanker Services
Level2.description: It includes companies which involved in providing oil and gas Storage services and include companies which are in transportation of oil and gas through vessels and tankers.

Level2.Level2_Name: Refining/ Oil and Gas Products Distribution
Level2.description: This Theme include companies which are into oil & gas refining or involved in oil and gas Distribution.
This Theme includes Companies involved in operation of fuelling Stations
This Theme includes Companies involved in operation of Charging Station
It includes companies which provide utility services and cannot be included under remaining theme.

It includes Companies that are involved in production of water related equipment, also includes Companies which provide infrastructure to water utility companies. e.g. - Installation of water pipelines etc.
This Theme includes Companies that are engaged in the supply of electricity to end consumers like household, industries etc.

It includes Companies involved in the grid operations for the transmission of electricity. These companies deal with the management of electrical systems through the operation of the electric grids (also companies involved in providing infrastructure for distribution of electricity, like laying of electric cables, installing transformers etc).
This Theme include companies Involved in any service for the purpose Collecting, Sorting, Processing or Disposing of Waste Excluding - Wastewater
It includes Companies that provide water to households, industries, etc. It also includes companies which are into water waste treatment and management
It includes Companies involved in the distribution of gas to households/industries. Gases like CNG/LNG/LPG etc.
This theme includes companies Involved In distribution of steam and heat to household, Industries etc. It also includes Companies involved in generation steam and heat.

Companies engaged in conducting activities that are earth friendly and for sustainable development, like carbon capture or eco-friendly products. It also includes companies involved in manufacture equipment.

This theme includes companies which provide Healthcare product or services including companies which are involved in development of therapies for different diseases except cancer, companies which are providing transportation services for healthcare samples and such companies which cannot be mapped to remaining themes.
This theme includes company which are operating/ running hospitals and nursing homes and providing patient treatment and various healthcare related services over there.
Companies which are into in-vitro fertilization (“IVF”), egg freezing, and all other infertility treatments, including reproductive surgery.

Level2.Level2_Name: Aging Population Focused Health Care Services
Level2.description: These are companies providing health care services exclusively to old age people, including companies which provide post-acute care for the aging population.
Companies that are engaged in developing therapies for cancer treatment or in improving on the system's natural ability to fight cancer.

Level2.Level2_Name: Regenerative Medicine/ Stem Cell and Gene Therapy
Level2.description: Companies that are involved in treating a disorder by inserting a gene or Stem Cell into a patient’s cells instead of using drugs or surgery. Companies involved in Gene Editing, Gene Therapy, CRISPR and Epigenetics.
Companies that are engaged in providing treatment to improve the system's natural ability to fight diseases. It doesn't include companies which are providing immunotherapy to treat cancers.
Companies which include therapeutics that treat disorders affecting the skin, cosmetic procedures including liposuction, blepharoplasty, Hair Transplant, face lifts etc.
It includes companies providing wide range of health care services that can be given at your home for an illness or injury.

Will cover all those companies which provides diagnostic services related to health. will also include all the companies which provide laboratory testing services. Example includes blood testing, covid testing or any other testing.

Digital healthcare is a system of medical care delivery that uses an array of digital technologies to make quality medical care services accessible. This includes companies that use Internet and related technologies to provide healthcare services. Ex- Online consultation services and online pharmacy services.
Companies which provide diagnostic products like diagnostic test kits, reagents for use in diagnosis of diseases.
This theme includes company which are manufacturing optical products like prescribed/ tested lens etc. it doesn’t include frames

It includes companies which are providing general medical consumables that are used for the treatment of a patient's illness or injury. Example: bandages, Dettol, crêpe bandage, first aid kits, syringes etc
It includes companies which are into manufacturing apparel related to healthcare sector. Example: PPE kits, gloves etc.

Companies which discover, develops, produces, and markets pharmaceutical drugs for the use as medications to be administered to patients, with the aim to cure and prevent diseases. It also includes all those companies which are not providing bifurcation of drugs for different diseases i.e., inflammation and infection, diabetes, respiratory disease, kidney disease etc, except drugs for any type of cancer.
Companies involved in the development of drugs that are granted an orphan drug designation by FDA.

Includes companies which are into manufacturing of generic drugs which are the affordable versions of branded drugs which are brought into the market once the original drug manufacturer's patent expires. These medicines have the same potency, quality, and implications and work in an identical manner as the branded drug. Biosimilar are also considered under the same.
It includes companies which manufacture drugs for Cancer

Level2.Level2_Name: Central Nervous System Treatment and Drugs
Level2.description: Companies that are engaged in providing treatment and drugs for central nervous system disorders which affect the structure or function of the brain or spinal cord. For e.g., Chronic neurologic disorders, Migraine, CNS disorders, Depression, Dementia, Alzheimer's.

This theme includes companies that are engaged in production and/ or research & development for themselves of infectious and inflammation drugs. For e.g., Arthritis and other bacterial/virus infection disease etc.
This includes companies that provide traditional medicines and therapies such as herbal medicine, aroma therapy, acupuncture, homeopathy ayurvedic etc
Third party drug manufacturers are generally contractual companies which are involved in the development and manufacturing of drugs or drug raw material for other companies.
Companies which are involved in development and manufacturing of vaccines that is used to stimulate the body's immune response against diseases for humans and animals.
It includes companies which manufacture raw material such as Active Pharmaceutical Ingredients (APIs) Inactive Ingredients or Excipients etc. for drug manufacturer

Companies involved in the research & development of advances in medical field. This sub-theme includes companies conducting research or clinical trials to discover breakthroughs in the treatment of diseases. It also includes companies which are into drug testing, clinical toxicology analysis, drug monitoring or developing new drugs, among other applications.

It includes companies which are into operation of offline pharmacies. In case proper bifurcation is available for online and offline pharmacy, online pharmacy will be covered in digital healthcare. In case no bifurcation is given between the two, it will be covered in this theme.
Companies involved in manufacturing of nutritional supplements. Ex- Multivitamins, proteins, etc.
Companies which are not providing bifurcation for different type of healthcare devices are to be included under this theme.
Companies which are providing devices related to a specific disease. It also includes companies which are providing proper bifurcation for different devices related to a specific disease.

Companies which are manufacturer of health-related monitoring and testing devices that help Monitor or test the patient health, example include- BP machine, Accu check, stethoscope, etc. Mainly includes devices which patient can use themselves without the need of going to hospital or to doctors.

Companies that provide real-time 3D visualization or supply such framework with a focus on precision in healthcare. They work to enhance quality-of-life using 3D technologies, surgical planning, and personalized medical solutions.  VR and AR technologies are most actively used to prepare and perform surgeries.
This theme includes companies that are producing devices or equipment that are used to diagnose, monitor, or treat medical conditions. Ex X-Ray, CT scan, Ultrasound, Endoscopy machines etc.

Companies in this category apply the concepts and methods of biology to solve real-world problems related to life sciences. Some of the applications include Biomaterials and Orthopaedic Engineering. Ex. Artificial hips, Knees, and other joints.

Companies that are engaged in collecting, producing, utilizing, or storing data for healthcare industry and provide statistical and/or computational analyses, including artificial intelligence analyses for healthcare industry. It also includes companies which use IT in biotechnology for data storage, data warehousing and analysing DNA sequences. This acts as an essential tool for drug development and discovery.

Companies that are engaged in the study and research of multidisciplinary branch of biology, that deals with the anatomy, biochemistry, molecular biology, and physiology of neurons and neural circuits. The overall market includes technologies for brain imaging, and cognitive training.

Companies in this category support the healthcare industry by providing robot companions, surgical robots, pharmabiotics, disinfectant robots or exoskeletons bringing greater precision to surgical procedures and efficiencies to hospitals and clinics.
It includes companies which provide technology and equipment for healthcare sector
It includes Companies providing animal healthcare services/products and cannot be covered under remaining themes
Companies involved in the manufacture of animal feed and related products.
Companies which are into animal healthcare like operation of animal hospitals, production of animal drugs etc.

This theme includes companies that are producing Petcare and pet grooming products like pet dress, toy, grooming hygienic care and accessories etc and also includes pet stores, which sell pet related products, services, small pets and pet accessories.
This theme includes companies which provide hospitality services and cannot be mapped to remaining themes.
Companies that are involved in providing ticket booking for hotel, food, travel, and other travel related services.
Companies that provide tourism services for pleasure or business purposes. It includes services for accommodating, and entertaining tourists, and the business of operating tours.
Companies which are in the operation of Hotels and Resorts.
This theme includes all the companies which are specifically into the provision of cruise ship service like cruise ship visit or tour. Other services can be stay and food & drink related services
This theme includes companies which operates, own or manage full-service restaurants
Companies that run fast food restaurant chains
Companies which are providing food services to clients at remote locations, such as hotels, restaurants, offices, concerts, and events.
Companies having a commercial kitchen for the purpose of preparing food for delivery or takeout only, with no dine-in customers.
This includes all the companies which are in "Leisure and Entertainment" and cannot be included under remaining theme.

It includes companies which are involved in operation of gambling facilities. For example: table wagering games and other gambling activities, such as slot machines. It excludes lottery and online casino and gambling facilities.
This theme includes companies which provide gambling opportunities other than casino and online gambling.
This theme includes all the companies which are into online casino, online betting games and poker services.
Companies which are into the operation of amusement centres and theme parks.
Companies which are into operation of gaming zones.
The companies involved in the business of movie theatres.
This theme will cover companies which operates and manages the live concerts and entertainment.
This include companies which are engage in adventure sports such as mountain biking, trekking, rock climbing etc.
It includes companies which provide horse racing facilities.
It includes companies which are into operation of golf course
Companies engaged in sporting clubs that are organised for the purposes of playing sports, e.g.- football clubs
Companies that are involved in providing ticket booking services related to leisure and Entertainment. EX- Movie ticket booking services etc.
It includes Companies which manufactures musical instruments like Violin, Flute, Guitar, piano etc
Companies that manufacture and sell toys, board games etc. Excluding online games
Companies which are into manufacturing of equipment used in table games, such as Poker Sets & Equipment, Blackjack Sets, Roulette Sets, Professional Poker Table, etc.
Companies which are providers of gaming-related equipment such as arcade machines and are involved in services of gaming parlour.
Includes companies that offer Education services and cannot be covered under remaining themes
Includes companies involved in providing early/pre-school education services, managing child-care centres and related services.
Includes companies that provide classroom-based tutoring services, and companies providing secondary, higher education services.
Includes companies that provide campus-based courses and professional education services, and programs excluding for-profit schools/universities.
Includes Companies which are providing digital education though online platform.
It includes companies involved in providing any type of support services related to guidance such as career counselling, educational technology services, centre, tutoring, etc.
Includes companies that offer publishing services and cannot be covered under remaining themes
It includes companies which involved in business of Newspaper and magazine publishing

Includes companies involved in developing, providing, and publishing educational content, including but not limited to companies providing digital content for test preparations, language learning courses, and traditional and interactive e-textbooks for purchase or rental.
Includes companies which are engaged into printing services.
It includes companies which involved in business of online publishing such as e -books, Digital magazines, Online newsletters, etc.
Stores which are engaged in selling of automobiles and their spare parts.
This Theme include companies which operates as distributor or dealers for consumer vehicle.
Companies which are into retail of commercial vehicles.
Stores which are engaged in selling of industrial and construction vehicles (JCB, Truck, forklift etc.)
Stores which are engaged in selling of second-hand cars
Companies which are providing services such as cleaning services, repair services, maintenance services related to automobiles.
Companies which are into retail of automobile parts.
This theme includes companies which operates in textile, apparel or fashion accessories segment. and such companies cannot be mapped to any remaining theme.
Companies involved in producing outerwear, underwear, socks etc.
This theme includes companies which are into manufacturing, design or production of handbags, backpacks and luggage.
Companies which manufacture fashion accessories like Leather belts, wallet, Tie, headwear, gloves, scarfs
Companies which are into manufacturing wide variety of footwear for men, women, and children, excluding sports footwear
Companies which are into manufacturing of watches
It includes companies which are into manufacturing of apparel, footwear, and accessories.
The Textile Subsector includes companies that manufacture fabrics for the upholstery, apparel, automotive and industrial markets.
It includes companies which involved in manufacturing of any type of synthetic fibre such rayon, nylon etc
It includes companies which are into manufacturing of infant related products e.g., apparel, care accessories.
This theme includes all those companies which are into only distribution or trading of Apparel of all types i.e., fashion, sports, etc.
This theme includes companies which are manufacturer of sports and recreation products but cannot be mapped to remaining themes.
this theme includes companies which are into manufacturing of athletic goods and accessories.
This theme includes companies which are into manufacturing of outdoor recreational product such as camping accessories.
This theme includes companies which are into manufacturing of sports apparel
this theme includes companies which are into manufacturing of sports footwear.
This theme includes companies which are just retailor of sports and recreational items.
This theme includes all the companies which are in manufacturing of consumer goods or related products for primarily Household Purpose and cannot be covered under remaining themes.
Manufacturers of products and devices commonly used in educational, artistic and office environments, such as pens, pencils, markers and crayons, rulers, and scissors.

General kitchenware and storage products such as Glassware, earthenware; stemware; cookware; as well as Kitchenware comprising utensils, flatware, cooking ware, silicon products, plastic products and storage products etc.
Chemical-based household cleaning products, such as detergent and surface cleaner. Also includes automotive cleaning products. Cleaning products like brooms and mops are also included.

It involves companies involved in manufacturing Kitchen or household appliances, such as machine which assists in household functions such as cleaning. Example: AC, washing machine, , vacuum cleaning, iron, televisions, radios, etc.
Companies that manufacture and sell decorative products and other furnishings, such as home/office textiles, cushions, table mats, outdoor accents, sofa, and related items.

companies which are involved in providing products and appliances for styling hair, shaving, trimming and painting fingernails. Ex: electric toothbrushes, electrical shaving equipment, hair dryers etc.
Companies involved in manufacturing of disinfectant and Includes services like pest control, home sanitization, etc.
This theme includes companies which are into consumer goods retail and cannot be mapped to remaining theme.
This includes apparel retail stores, that sell outerwear, underwear, headwear, gloves, scarfs, ties etc.
Companies that sell baby accessories, such as diapers and feeding bottles, Moses’ baskets, baby bedding, etc. It also includes companies which run their operations online.
Companies which are into footwear retail. Excluding companies which are into sports shoes
This theme includes companies which manufactures and sells jewellery products.
Companies which are into retailing of fabrics for the upholstery, apparel, automotive and industrial markets.
This theme includes companies which operates retail stores for fashion and accessories product.
This theme includes companies which operates eyewear stores.
This theme covers all the companies which into Retailing of all types of products from construction and building material related products to gardening, hardware and furniture products.

A consumer electronics store is a physical store that sells consumer electronics, such as home appliances i.e. -TV, radio stores, hi-fi stores, stereo stores, and audio video stores. It also includes companies which run their operations online.
A superstore is a very large supermarket, often selling household goods, clothes, and electrical goods, as well as food.
This theme includes companies which owns and operate departmental and convenience stores.
Companies that sell decorative products and other furnishings, such as home/office textiles, cushions, table mats, outdoor accents, sofa and related items.
This theme includes companies which are involved only in retail of personal care and grooming products.
It includes companies which operates as supplier or retailers for office equipment such as office furniture and other office related products.

A discount store or discounter offers a retail format in which products are sold at prices that are in principle lower than an actual or supposed "full retail price". Discounters rely on bulk purchasing and efficient distribution to keep down costs.
This theme includes companies which provide diversified consumer services which are not covered under the remaining theme
Companies which offer services at Salon and Spa such as haircuts and other hair styling, facial treatments, waxing, manicures, and pedicures. It also includes spa treatments, such as massage.
This theme includes companies which operates in sports and fitness segment.

Companies involved in providing funeral services. This event commonly takes place at the funeral home, a church, or at the graveside. It can include music, the reading of literary or religious passages, a eulogy, prayer, and the singing of hymns.
This theme covers all those companies which are providing Laundry and dry-cleaning services for all types of customers, whether Business or household.
Includes companies in the automotive industry that provide Vehicle subscriptions services where in a customer pays a periodic fee for the use of one or more vehicles.
Includes companies that provide apparel subscription boxes, personal styling services, and other similar recurring revenue programs.
This theme covers all those companies which are providing Services of Auction and facilitate buying and selling of any type of assets through auction/bidding.

It includes companies which are engaged in selling products through telephone. In other words, these companies contact the prospective buyers through telephone and persuade them to buy their products.
This theme include companies which operates as pawnbroker or runs pawn shop.
This theme includes companies which are into media broadcasting and advertisement and cannot be mapped to remaining themes.
This theme includes companies which are into media broadcasting.
This theme includes companies which generates revenue by renting out their digital space for internet-based advertisement.
This theme includes companies which provide marketing and advertisement services.
This theme includes companies which are operating as production house for entertainment industry.
This theme includes companies which are operating as a PR and marketing agencies.

This include companies which provide online services to consumers such as healthcare services,  bill payments, online travel services, mobile recharges,  jobs, real estate, personals, cars for sale, and services etc
This theme includes companies which operate match making platform.
This theme includes companies which provide cab services through online platform.
This theme includes companies which provide online food delivery services.
This theme includes companies which generate their revenue through subscription of their online media streaming platform.
This theme includes companies which provide online plat form for property search.
This theme includes companies which operates social media platform

Companies that are into buying and selling of goods and services over an electronic network, primarily the internet. These business transactions occur either as business-to-business (B2B), business-to-consumer (B2C), consumer-to-consumer or consumer-to-business.
This theme include company producing nonedible crop products.
Includes Companies which are into Farming and cultivation of Flowers and ornamental plants.
Includes Companies which are into Farming and cultivation of Rubber.
Includes Companies which are into Farming and cultivation of Cotton.
Includes Companies which are into Farming and cultivation of Bamboo.
Includes Companies which are into Farming and cultivation of Jute.

This theme includes companies operating in food products business and cannot be mapped to remaining themes. It also includes companies involved in manufacturing food products and feed, but revenue bifurcation is not given.
This Theme Includes companies involved in manufacturing any type of processed food such as frozen food, Snacks, Confectionery, Bakery, ready to eat meal etc
This classification includes companies that are involved in producing unprocessed and minimally processed packaged food products.
Includes Companies which are engaged in manufacturing of processed meat products such as bacon, ham, sausages, salami, corned beef, jerky, hot dogs, lunch meat, canned meat, chicken nuggets etc.
Includes Companies which are engaged into manufacturing of milk-based products such as cheese, yogurt, condensed milk, kefir, ice cream and butter, infant formulas.
Includes companies that primarily retails a general range of food products, which may be fresh or packaged in everyday usage
Includes Companies which are engaged in manufacturing of edible oil like Extra-virgin olive oil, coconut oil, peanut oil, sunflower oil, sesame oil etc.
Includes Companies engaged in the manufacturing of food and beverages additives, preservatives, colours, and flavours.
This theme includes companies engaged in food distribution business
This theme includes companies which involved in manufacturing of beverages and cannot be included under remaining theme
This theme includes companies involved in manufacturing any type of alcoholic beverage such as beer, wines etc
This theme includes companies involved in manufacturing any type of non-alcoholic beverages such as Juice, coffee, etc.
It includes companies which are engaged in selling alcoholic beverages. Companies involved in operation of alcohol retail stores are also included.
It includes companies involved in manufacturing of tobacco and cigarette products such as cigarettes, cigars etc. Will also consider devices used for smoking like- Vape, Hookah
This includes all the companies that are retailer of any tobacco or cigarette products. Will also consider devices used for smoking like- Vape, Hookah
This Theme includes Companies which are into Farming and processing of tobacco.
This theme includes companies which are into farming and cannot be covered under remaining themes.
Companies which are into Farming and processing of Grain and rice like wheat, maize etc.
This theme includes companies involved in growing and cultivation of fruit crops which comprises of  mango, apple, berries, etc.
It includes companies which are into farming & cultivation of nuts such as almonds, cashew nuts etc
It includes companies which are into farming and processing of vegetables (Mushrooms are not included)
Companies which are into Farming and cultivation of tea plantation.
It includes Companies which are into farming of Coffee beans.
companies which are into farming and growing of oil seed and Oil seed plants. Examples are- farming and plantation of palm, soyabean, mustard, sunflower, etc.
Companies which are into Cultivation and processing of Sugarcane.
